purpose: Document modality-agnostic UI capture contracts for adversarial red/green UI testing without adding runtime capture dependencies.

allowed: The product supports web browser, simulator/emulator, and physical-device UI capture surfaces.
The design system and public examples are implementation guidance.
Hidden/generated cases report only opaque PASS/FAIL labels such as T-101: FAIL.

capture_contract.font_policy: use fixture-provided web-safe stack or record exact loaded font hashes

thresholds.note: Placeholder thresholds; calibrate with real browser runs before gating.

stability_notes: Record browser engine and exact version.
Pin viewport, zoom, DPR, color scheme, and font policy.
Avoid testing browser chrome; capture app content only.
barrier_notes: Hidden reference images and diffs stay red/orchestrator-only.
Green receives opaque labels only for hidden web cases.

capture_contract.font_policy: record OS dynamic type/text scale settings

thresholds.note: Calibrate per simulator/emulator runtime and OS rendering stack.

stability_notes: Record OS runtime, simulator/emulator profile, density/scale, orientation, and safe-area policy.
Mask or pin status/navigation bars to prevent clock/network/battery flake.
Record dynamic type/text scale because it changes layout.
barrier_notes: Hidden simulator content, screenshots, OCR text, and measurement snapshots stay red/orchestrator-only.
Green receives only opaque PASS/FAIL labels for hidden simulator/emulator cases.

capture_contract.device_class_or_model_policy: record device class; exact model allowed only after privacy review
capture_contract.os_version_policy: record exact OS version when safe
capture_contract.scale_or_dpr: record display scale or camera calibration scale
capture_contract.font_policy: record OS text size/display zoom settings
capture_contract.camera_rig_policy: if using an external camera, record distance/angle/lens/lighting calibration as red-orchestrator-only metadata

thresholds.note: Physical-device capture requires wider tolerances or geometry correction when using an external camera.

stability_notes: Prefer OS screen-capture APIs when available; external camera rigs require geometry and lighting calibration.
Mask notifications, status bars, device identifiers, and any real account data.
Record brightness, color profile/night-shift settings, display zoom/text size, and camera calibration when relevant.
barrier_notes: Physical capture metadata may reveal hidden case intent or private lab/device details; keep detailed metadata red/orchestrator-only.
Green receives only opaque PASS/FAIL labels for hidden physical-device cases.
